questionHtml:
Nicole walks to work on mornings when her car does not start and it is not raining. Nicole takes the bus to work on mornings when her car does not start and it is raining.

Where Nicole lives, there is a 42 % probability of rain on any given morning, independent of any other morning. The probability of Nicole’s car starting is independent of the weather.

Find the probability that Nicole’s car starts on exactly three mornings in a particular 5 day workweek.
markschemeHtml:
evidence of using binomial distribution                    (M1)

Note: Evidence is X~B5, 0.72 or binomial with n=5, p=0.72.

0.293 0.292626…                    A1

[2 marks]

meta.title: Find the probability that Nicole’s car starts on exactly three mornings in a particular 5 day workweek.
